title: Better Glass Panes
description: This mod lets you place glass panes on slabs and stairs!
body: # This mod allows you to place glass panes inside slabs and stairs! To do so, simply place down a stair or slab of your choice and then right click it with a glasspane in hand! The glass panes can be safely removed by breaking the block with a silktouch tool, or simply broken by hand, in which case you wont get the pane back.
